data.body:
Classification: behavioral, Score: 1 (BASIC)
Investigation: ROOT_CAUSE: detect-stack.sh only checks for marker files as direct children of the passed-in directory, with no recursive subdirectory scanning — so when the actual app lives in a subdirectory, the script returns 'unknown'. confidence: high. proposed_fix: Add subdirectory scan fallback using find -maxdepth 2 before echoing 'unknown'. hypothesis confirmed: detect-stack.sh has zero find/glob/recursive calls; running it on a parent dir returns unknown while subdirectory returns node-npm. testing_mode=RED
